 {"id":"bd-jv4w","title":"Phase 1.2: Separate bdt executable - Initial structure","description":"Create minimal bdt command structure completely separate from bd. Must not share code, config, or database.

## Subtasks
1. Create cmd/bdt/ directory with main.go
2. Implement bdt version, help, and status commands
3. Configure separate database location: $HOME/.bdt/ (not $HOME/.beads/)
4. Create separate issues file: issues.toon (not issues.jsonl)
5. Update build system:
   - Makefile: Add bdt target
   - .goreleaser.yml: Add bdt binary config

## Files to Create
- cmd/bdt/main.go - Entry point
- cmd/bdt/version.go - Version handling
- cmd/bdt/help.go - Help text (separate from bd)

## Success Criteria
- `make build` produces both `bd` and `bdt` executables
- `bdt version` shows distinct version output from bd
- `bdt --help` shows distinct help text
- bdt uses $HOME/.bdt/ directory (verify with `bdt info`)
- bd and bdt completely isolated (no shared imports beyond stdlib)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T11:48:34.866877282-07:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T12:59:11.389296015-07:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T12:59:11.389296015-07:00"}
 {"id":"bd-jvu","title":"Add bd update --parent flag to change issue parent","description":"Allow changing an issue's parent with bd update --parent <new-parent-id>. Useful for reorganizing tasks under different epics or moving issues between hierarchies. Should update the parent-child dependency relationship.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:24:07.274485-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T22:34:07.318938-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-17T22:34:07.318938-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-kptp","title":"Merge: bd-qioh","description":"branch: polecat/Errata
target: main
source_issue: bd-qioh
rig: beads","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"merge-request","created_at":"2025-12-23T13:46:08.832073-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T19:12:08.350136-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-23T19:12:08.350136-08:00","close_reason":"Stale merge-requests from orphaned polecat branches - refinery not processing"}
-{"id":"bd-kpy","title":"Sync race: rebase-based divergence recovery resurrects tombstones","description":"## Problem
When two repos sync simultaneously, tombstones can be resurrected:

1. Repo A deletes issue (creates tombstone), pushes to sync branch
2. Repo B (with 'closed' status) exports and tries to push
3. Push fails (non-fast-forward)
4. fetchAndRebaseInWorktree does git rebase
5. Git rebase applies B's 'closed' patch on top of A's 'tombstone'
6. TEXT-level rebase doesn't invoke beads merge driver
7. 'closed' overwrites 'tombstone' = resurrection

## Root Cause
CommitToSyncBranch uses git rebase for divergence recovery, but rebase is text-level, not content-level. The proper content-level merge in PullFromSyncBranch handles tombstones correctly, but it runs AFTER the problematic push.

## Proposed Fix
Option 1: Don't push in CommitToSyncBranch - let PullFromSyncBranch handle merge+push
Option 2: Replace git rebase with content-level merge in fetchAndRebaseInWorktree
Option 3: Reorder sync steps: Export → Pull/Merge → Commit → Push

## Workaround Applied
Excluded tombstones from orphan detection warnings (commit 1e97d9cc).

See also: bd-3852 (Add orphan detection migration)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-17T23:29:33.049272-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T23:29:33.049272-08:00"}
+{"id":"bd-kpy","title":"Sync race: rebase-based divergence recovery resurrects tombstones","description":"## Problem
When two repos sync simultaneously, tombstones can be resurrected:

1. Repo A deletes issue (creates tombstone), pushes to sync branch
2. Repo B (with 'closed' status) exports and tries to push
3. Push fails (non-fast-forward)
4. fetchAndRebaseInWorktree does git rebase
5. Git rebase applies B's 'closed' patch on top of A's 'tombstone'
6. TEXT-level rebase doesn't invoke beads merge driver
7. 'closed' overwrites 'tombstone' = resurrection

## Root Cause
CommitToSyncBranch uses git rebase for divergence recovery, but rebase is text-level, not content-level. The proper content-level merge in PullFromSyncBranch handles tombstones correctly, but it runs AFTER the problematic push.

## Proposed Fix
Option 1: Don't push in CommitToSyncBranch - let PullFromSyncBranch handle merge+push
Option 2: Replace git rebase with content-level merge in fetchAndRebaseInWorktree
Option 3: Reorder sync steps: Export → Pull/Merge → Commit → Push

## Workaround Applied
Excluded tombstones from orphan detection warnings (commit 1e97d9cc).

See also: bd-3852 (Add orphan detection migration)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-17T23:29:33.049272-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-24T22:41:09.184574-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-24T22:41:09.184574-08:00","close_reason":"Fixed by replacing git rebase with content-level merge in divergence recovery"}
 {"id":"bd-kqo1","title":"Show pin indicator in bd list output","description":"Add a visual indicator (e.g., pin emoji or [P] marker) for pinned issues in bd list output so users can easily identify them.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-18T23:33:47.402549-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T11:30:27.272768-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-21T11:30:27.272768-08:00","close_reason":"Already implemented - 📌 emoji shown for pinned issues in bd list output","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-kqo1","depends_on_id":"bd-0vg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-18T23:33:56.771791-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-kqo1","depends_on_id":"bd-7h5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-18T23:34:07.985271-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"bd-kwjh","title":"Wisp storage: ephemeral molecule tracking","description":"Implement ephemeral molecule storage for patrol cycles.

## Architecture

Wisps are ephemeral molecules stored in `.beads-wisps/` (gitignored).
When squashed, they create digests in permanent `.beads/`.

**Storage is per-rig, not per-role**: Witness and Refinery share mayor/rig's 
`.beads-wisps/` since they execute from that context.

## Design Doc
See: gastown/mayor/rig/docs/wisp-architecture.md

## Key Requirements

1. **Ephemeral storage**: `.beads-wisps/` directory, gitignored
2. **Bond with --wisp**: Creates in wisps instead of permanent
3. **Squash**: Deletes wisp, creates digest in permanent beads
4. **Burn**: Deletes wisp, no digest
5. **Wisp commands**: `bd wisp list`, `bd wisp gc`

## Storage Locations

| Context | Location |
|---------|----------|
| Rig (Deacon, Witness, Refinery) | mayor/rig/.beads-wisps/ |
| Polecat (if used) | polecats/<name>/.beads-wisps/ |

## Children (to be created)
- bd mol bond --wisp flag
- .beads-wisps/ storage backend
- bd mol squash handles wisp to permanent
- bd wisp list command
- bd wisp gc command (orphan cleanup)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"beads/dave","created_at":"2025-12-21T23:34:47.188806-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T01:12:53.965768-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-22T01:12:53.965768-08:00","close_reason":"All 6 subtasks completed: wisp storage backend, mol bond --wisp flag, mol squash wisp→digest, wisp list, wisp gc, and mol burn commands implemented"}
 {"id":"bd-kwjh.1","title":".beads-ephemeral/ storage backend","description":"Implement ephemeral storage layer for wisps.

## Requirements
- New storage location: .beads-ephemeral/issues.jsonl (sibling to .beads/)
- Gitignored by default (add to .beads/.gitignore)
- Same JSONL format as regular beads
- Config option: ephemeral.directory (relative path)
- ephemeral.enabled config flag

## Storage Behavior
- Ephemeral issues have `ephemeral: true` field
- No sync to remote (local only)
- No daemon tracking needed (transient)

## Implementation
- Add EphemeralStore in storage package
- Initialize on demand when --ephemeral flag used
- Share Issue struct, just different storage path","status":"tombstone","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T00:06:46.706026-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T00:08:26.009875-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-kwjh.1","depends_on_id":"bd-kwjh","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-22T00:06:46.706461-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}],"deleted_at":"2025-12-22T00:08:26.009875-08:00","deleted_by":"daemon","delete_reason":"delete","original_type":"task"}
